scripts.final:web: npm run final:client && npm run dev --workspace @merida/web
scripts.final:extension: npm run final:client && npm run dev --workspace @merida/extension
scripts.final:check-generated: npm run final:generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/api-client/openapi.json packages/api-client/src/generated
scripts.final:client: npm run final:generate && npm run build --workspace @merida/api-client
scripts.final:lint: eslint apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src scripts && prettier --check package.json apps/web/package.json apps/extension/package.json packages/api-client/package.json packages/ui/package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.final.json apps/web/tsconfig.json apps/extension/tsconfig.json packages/api-client/tsconfig.json packages/ui/tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json scripts apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src
scripts.final:format: prettier --write package.json apps/web/package.json apps/extension/package.json packages/api-client/package.json packages/ui/package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.final.json apps/web/tsconfig.json apps/extension/tsconfig.json packages/api-client/tsconfig.json packages/ui/tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json scripts apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src
scripts.final:test: npm run build --workspace @merida/api-client && npm run final:check-no-demo && node --test apps/web/src/features/dashboard/dashboardSession.test.ts apps/web/src/shared/api/dashboardClient.test.ts apps/extension/src/session/captureSession.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/activeTabEvidence.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/captureClient.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/captureHealth.test.ts && node scripts/final-python.mjs -m pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.final:build: npm run final:client && npm run build --workspace @merida/web && npm run build --workspace @merida/extension && npm run final:check-no-demo-builds
scripts.test:final: npm run final:check-generated && npm run final:typecheck && npm run final:lint && npm run final:test && npm run final:build
scripts.test: node --test test/parity/*.test.js src/backend/test/*.test.js src/features/jobPostings/test/*.test.js src/features/notes/test/*.test.js src/features/resumes/test/*.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover -s src/features/resumes/ml/test
